title: URBAN_128x
description: Urban resource pack for Minecraft Java edition.
body:
URBAN resource pack i.e. ultimate resource pack by Aryan Nikose.

It is a resource pack for Minecraft Java as well as bedrock (the bedrock version is available [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DODG5mHa0ThDLvyyJiv_S0OjcvMieLo6/view)).

The pack supports all the latest versions with new updates. 
Shaders are to be used with the resource pack, I'd recommend BSL or SEUS renewed shaders.
If you want to explore higher resolution versions do check my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Urban_Textures_Pack?fan_landing=true) It helps a lot indeed to continue my work.

Have a nice day fellas I hope you guys enjoy.
